variants.title: HiFi Filter OT 2142 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO59705
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter OT 2142 Air/Oil Separator is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAO59705. Easy to install and replace, the OT 2142 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
